csv_report.title: Membership Rates – Apr 20, 2026 to May 20, 2026
csv_report.sql:
SELECT
  vm.plan_name AS membership_plan,
  COUNT(DISTINCT vm.membership_id) AS total_members,
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN vm.state = 'active' THEN vm.membership_id END) AS active_members,
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN vm.state = 'cancelled' THEN vm.membership_id END) AS cancelled_members,
  COUNT(b.booking_id) AS total_bookings,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN b.status = 'confirmed' AND b.checked_in_at IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END) AS attended_bookings,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN b.status = 'cancelled' THEN 1 END) AS cancelled_bookings,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN b.status = 'waitlisted' THEN 1 END) AS waitlisted_bookings,
  ROUND(
    100.0 * COUNT(CASE WHEN b.status = 'confirmed' AND b.checked_in_at IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END)
    / NULLIF(COUNT(b.booking_id), 0), 2
  ) AS attendance_rate_pct,
  ROUND(
    1.0 * COUNT(b.booking_id)
    / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT vm.membership_id), 0), 2
  ) AS avg_bookings_per_member,
  ROUND(
    1.0 * COUNT(CASE WHEN b.status = 'confirmed' AND b.checked_in_at IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END)
    / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT vm.membership_id), 0), 2
  ) AS avg_attended_per_member,
  ROUND(vm.plan_price_dollars, 2) AS plan_price_dollars
FROM vw_memberships vm
LEFT JOIN vw_class_attendance b
  ON b.customer_id = vm.customer_id
  AND b.paid_with_membership = 1
  AND strftime('%Y-%m-%d', b.start_at) BETWEEN '2026-04-20' AND '2026-05-20'
WHERE
  strftime('%Y-%m-%d', vm.activated_at) <= '2026-05-20'
  AND (vm.cancelled_at IS NULL OR strftime('%Y-%m-%d', vm.cancelled_at) >= '2026-04-20')
GROUP BY vm.plan_name, vm.plan_price_dollars
ORDER BY total_bookings DESC
